description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a covered porch with columns, a driveway leading to an attached single-car garage, and a landscaped yard with several trees. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a small swimming pool, outdoor seating, and additional landscaping. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with subtle accents around the windows and doors. The overall layout is open and functional, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard deck with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and large glass doors opening to the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, deck, and the side of the house with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and minimal decorative elements
